ZTE Corporation
ZXA10 C320 Optical Access Convergence Equipment
Command Reference Manual

OID enterprise prefix: 1.3.6.1.4.1.3902

show onu {interface} {onu-id} [detail]
Function: Displays the status and optical information of a GPON ONU.
Prerequisite: PON Port, Line Profile
RxPower: -25.3 dBm
TxPower: 2.1 dBm
Status: online

create onu {interface} {onu-id} profile {line-profile}
Function: Creates a GPON ONU on the specified PON port.
Prerequisite: PON Port, Line Profile

show gpon-onu-state {interface}
Function: Displays the registration state of all ONUs on a PON port.

save
Function: Saves the running configuration to flash.
